overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks through a neon-lit indoor commercial corridor past bodies on the ground, approaches a locked door with 'Tyger Claws' graffiti, examines the security keypad, then turns around and exits to an open urban plaza with futuristic parked vehicles and vibrant neon signage.

passing multiple bodies lying on the ground in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow neon-lit commercial corridor lined with digital billboards on the left and arcade machines on the right. Several bodies lie on the concrete floor ahead. A pedestrian briefly passes by on the left as the camera advances toward a distant door marked with 'TYGER CLAWS' graffiti.

scene_state.functional_zone: locked security door with biometric keypad

events.description: examining the security keypad next to the Tyger Claws door
turning away from the door after attempting to interact with the keypad

agents.ego_description: approaching the Tyger Claws door and examining the security access panel and keypad

entered.detail: wall-mounted access panel with glowing green light and red button
purple metal frame surrounding the orange door

segments.scene_description: The player stops at the Tyger Claws door and focuses on the security keypad with its glowing green indicator light. After examining the locked door, the player turns around to head back down the corridor, leaving the arcade machines and billboards behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with vending machines approaching exit

events.description: passing red vending machine and electrical panels on the right
approaching the corridor exit into the open plaza

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back down the corridor toward the open plaza exit

entered.detail: tall red automated vending machine with illuminated product display
industrial electrical box with warning symbols
large industrial waste containers with hazard symbols

segments.scene_description: The player walks back through the corridor, passing a red vending machine and electrical panels on the right. The arcade machines recede into the distance as the player approaches the corridor exit, with recycling bins visible near the transition to the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban plaza with parked futuristic vehicles

events.description: exiting the enclosed corridor into the open urban plaza
approaching parked futuristic sports cars in the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza observing the neon-lit architecture and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car with neon underglow parked in the plaza

entered.detail: sleek black sports car with yellow wheel accents and purple neon lighting
green futuristic vehicle parked near the plaza entrance
multi-level structures with vibrant pink and purple neon strip lighting
large structural columns with purple neon base lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor into a wide urban plaza illuminated by vibrant neon lights. A futuristic black sports car is parked prominently in the center, with a green sports car visible to the left. The plaza is surrounded by towering buildings with pink and purple neon accents, creating a dense cyberpunk city atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic, neon-lit commercial corridor into a sprawling, vibrant urban plaza. It begins by advancing through a narrow hallway lined with digital billboards and arcade machines, passing fallen bodies on the concrete floor toward a door marked with Tyger Claws graffiti. As the camera pauses to examine a glowing green security keypad, the perspective then pivots and retreats back down the corridor, passing a red vending machine and electrical panels. The scene then opens as the camera exits the confined space past recycling bins, transitioning from the dim hallway into the wide expanse of a city square. Finally, the view expands to reveal a futuristic black sports car and towering buildings bathed in pink and purple neon accents under a dense cyberpunk sky.
